spaces.name: Casita — Guest Unit
spaces.notes: Standard casita unit — private bathroom, terrace. Avg 60 sqm per seed data.

spaces.name: Spa
spaces.notes: Full-service spa including treatment rooms, relaxation areas, and hydrotherapy zone.

spaces.name: Restaurant
spaces.notes: Full-service F&B program — kitchen, dining, service areas. COFEPRIS compliance required.

spaces.name: Reception / Lobby
spaces.notes: Hotel reception, concierge, sitting area, main arrival sequence.

spaces.name: Pool Deck
spaces.notes: Main pool, lounging deck, and wet bar service area.

spaces.name: Staff Quarters
spaces.notes: Staff accommodation, locker rooms, and break room.

spaces.name: Parking
spaces.notes: Surface parking for guests and staff. SECTUR required minimum count.

spaces.name: Circulation Areas
spaces.notes: Covered walkways and internal circulation paths between casitas and amenities.

assumptions: Total programmed sqm of 3,000 confirmed from seed data — sum of all spaces × quantities: (20×60) + 300 + 250 + 150 + 400 + 120 + 200 + 320 + 60 = 3,000 sqm
Casita size of 60 sqm per unit taken directly from seed data program specification
Pool deck area includes deck/hardscape surround — pool structure itself is counted within this zone
Landscape areas, arroyo buffer zone, and site setbacks are NOT included in programmed sqm — these are part of the 12,000 sqm site area only
Solar array area is excluded from programmed sqm — to be determined in Phase 3 engineering coordination
Greywater recycling infrastructure is distributed across BOH and site — not assigned as a separate program space
